ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "subject_nr" INTEGER /* Participant's number for tracking */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history */,
  "psychological_profile" TEXT /* Psychological assessments or profiles */,
  "participation_consent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant has given consent */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the participant */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant started participating in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "trial_count" INTEGER /* Number of trials in the block */,
  "block_type" TEXT /* Type of block (e.g., practice, experimental) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the block */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment for the block */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for the block */,
  "block_start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the block started */,
  "block_end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the block ended */,
  "block_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES session_data ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the outcome */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Reaction time of the participant during the trial */,
  "outcome_eye_closed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the outcome was measured with eyes closed */,
  "outcome_params_1" REAL /* Additional parameters for outcome analysis */,
  "outcome_params_2" REAL /* More parameters for outcome analysis */,
  "outcome_params_3" REAL /* Further parameters for outcome analysis */,
  "outcome_sigma" REAL /* Sigma value for outcome variability */,
  "outcome_pupil_area" REAL /* Pupil area measurement during the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant for the outcome */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for the outcome */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the outcome */,
  "outcome_confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES session_data ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guesses" (
  "guess_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guess record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the guess */,
  "guess_value" REAL /* Value of the guess made by the participant */,
  "guess_eye_closed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the guess was made with eyes closed */,
  "guess_params_1" REAL /* Additional parameters for guess analysis */,
  "guess_params_2" REAL /* More parameters for guess analysis */,
  "guess_params_3" REAL /* Further parameters for guess analysis */,
  "guess_sigma" REAL /* Sigma value for guess variability */,
  "guess_pupil_area" REAL /* Pupil area measurement during guess */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant for the guess */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for the guess */,
  "guess_confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the guess */,
  "guess_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the guess */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guess_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guesses_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES session_data ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guesses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eye_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eye tracking record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the tracking data */,
  "eye_position_x" REAL /* Horizontal position of the eye during the trial */,
  "eye_position_y" REAL /* Vertical position of the eye during the trial */,
  "blink_count" INTEGER /* Count of blinks recorded during the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant for the eye tracking data */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session for the eye tracking data */,
  "eye_tracking_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the eye tracking data */,
  "eye_tracking_device" TEXT /* Type of eye tracking device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eye_tracking_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eye_tracking_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES session_data ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_data" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant for the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment for the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "session_environment" TEXT /* Description of the environment during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numeric value indicating the user's access level */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_name" TEXT /* Name of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., visual, auditory) */,
  "stimulus_source" TEXT /* Source of the stimulus (e.g., database, custom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)
